redacted_summary: When a user reports that both scripted repair and AI repair have already failed, avoid repeating the same automated guidance and escalate to the appropriate role-based maintainer. For bot non-response issues, distinguish UI inactivity from backend work by checking whether tool calls are occurring and consider model latency or switching models. For messaging-platform integrations, a disabled plugin can prevent websocket connection and message receipt; remediation is to enable the integration, restart the service, and verify identity resolution, websocket readiness, service health, and integration configuration.
